inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Total horizontal length of the wall in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total horizontal length of the wall in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duvarın metre cinsinden toplam yatay uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte horizontale Länge der Wand in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur horizontale totale du mur en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud horizontal total de la pared en metros.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical height of the wall in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical height of the wall in meters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikale Höhe der Wand in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur verticale du mur en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura vertical de la pared en metros.

inputs.label: Block Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of one cinder block in meters (typically 0.4 m).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of one cinder block in meters (typically 0.4 m).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir briketin metre cinsinden uzunluğu (genellikle 0,4 m).
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge eines Betonsteins in Metern (normalerweise 0,4 m).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'un parpaing en mètres (généralement 0,4 m).
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de un bloque de hormigón en metros (normalmente 0,4 m).

inputs.label: Block Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of one cinder block in meters (typically 0.2 m).

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of one cinder block in meters (typically 0.2 m).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir briketin metre cinsinden yüksekliği (genellikle 0,2 m).
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe eines Betonsteins in Metern (normalerweise 0,2 m).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur d'un parpaing en mètres (généralement 0,2 m).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de un bloque de hormigón en metros (normalmente 0,2 m).

inputs.label: Mortar Joint Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of mortar joint between blocks in millimeters.

label_i18n.es: Espesor de la junta de mortero

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of mortar joint between blocks in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bloklar arasındaki harç derzinin milimetre cinsinden kalınlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dicke der Mörtelfuge zwischen den Steinen in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur du joint de mortier entre les blocs en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor de la junta de mortero entre bloques en milímetros.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra blocks to account for cutting and breakage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of extra blocks to account for cutting and breakage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve kırılma için ek blok yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz zusätzlicher Steine für Verschnitt und Bruch.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de blocs supplémentaires pour tenir compte de la coupe et de la casse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de bloques adicionales para compensar cortes y roturas.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
